| Error | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| `ErrShowingHelp` | Help was displayed (not a failure) |
| `ErrShowingVersion` | Version was displayed (not a failure) |
| `ErrCommandNotFound` | No command matched the arguments |
| `ErrNoCommands` | No commands registered |
| `ErrNoArguments` | No arguments and no default command |
